news.title: Strait of Hormuz must remain closed as 'tool to pressure enemy,' Iran's new supreme leader says
news.summary: Iran's new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei has said all U.S. military bases in the Middle East should close immediately as those bases will be attacked.

news.title: Energy Secretary Wright says U.S. 'not ready' to escort oil tankers through Strait of Hormuz yet
news.summary: Tanker traffic through the Strait remains at a standstill as ship owners fear attacks by Iran. The closure has triggered the largest oil supply disruption ever.

news.title: Anthropic’s Claude would ‘pollute’ defense supply chain: Pentagon CTO
news.summary: "This is not meant to be punitive," Michael told CNBC's "Squawk Box" Michael: "It's not a punishment. It's a way for us to move forward"

news.title: Palantir is still using Anthropic's Claude as Pentagon blacklist plays out, CEO Karp says
news.summary: The Pentagon officially designated Anthropic a supply-chain risk last week, but the DOD is still using Claude for the war in Iran. The Pentagon is using Anthropic to send weapons to the Middle East.

news.title: The two oil pipelines helping Saudi Arabia and UAE bypass the Strait of Hormuz
news.summary: Saudi Arabia's East-West pipeline and the UAE's Abu Dhabi Crude Oil Pipeline are thought to be able to help partially offset the Strait of Hormuz blockage.

news.title: Oil tops $101 before dipping as Iran ramps up strikes and IEA calls conflict biggest supply disruption in history
news.summary: Oil prices spiked again on Thursday morning after Iran ramped up its strikes on infrastructure in the Gulf. Oil prices spike again as Iran ramps up strikes in Gulf.

news.title: ‘My parents begged me never to put him in a home’: I have taken care of my disabled brother my entire life. Am I doing enough?
news.summary: ”I have $560,000 in my IRA, $125,000  in stocks and $50,00 in savings,” she says. ”I’m in a good place.”

news.title: U.S. economic outlook cut by Goldman over the Iran war — and the fear goes beyond oil
news.summary: Goldman Sachs economists Manuel Abecasis and David Mericle in a new research note looked at the economic implications of the Iran war on the U.S. economy.

news.title: Oil price target hiked for second time in a week at Goldman Sachs
news.summary: If Strait of Hormuz stays shut through March then a 2008-type price spike is possible, says CNN's John Defterios.

news.title: America is on the brink of stagflation, warns Nobel prize-winning economist
news.summary: Joseph Stiglitz says the four horsemen of the economic apocalypse are nearing. He says the U.S. is on the verge of an economic collapse.
